items.title: Police hunt for suspect, motive after UnitedHealth executive killed | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
Brian Thompson, the CEO of UnitedHealth's insurance unit, was fatally shot outside a Midtown Manhattan hotel in what police called a 'brazen' targeted attack by a gunman who had been lying in wait.

#News #unitedhealth #brianthompson #ceo #Reuters #Newsfeed

items.title: French opposition topple Barnier's government in no-confidence vote | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
French lawmakers passed a no-confidence vote against the government, throwing the European Union's second-biggest economic power deeper into a crisis that threatens its capacity to legislate and tame a massive budget deficit.

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #world #Europe #politics #France #noconfidence #Barnier

items.title: Tech rally, Powell lift indexes to record highs | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:

items.author: Reuters
items.content:

items.title: Bitcoin hits $100,000 amid optimism over Trump's crypto plans | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
Bitcoin rose above $100,000 for the first time as the election of Republican Donald Trump as president of the United States spurred expectations that his administration will create a friendly regulatory environment for cryptocurrencies.

items.title: Drugmakers brace for US political side effects
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
Donald Trump’s health (https://www.reuters.com/breakingviews/european-pharmas-growth-prescription-pivot-us-2024-11-28/)  agency nominee, Robert Kennedy, brings dangerous views (https://www.reuters.com/breakingviews/vaccine-makers-exposed-political-pathogen-2024-11-07/)  on vaccines as well as skepticism about sky-high medicine prices. In this week’s Viewsroom, Breakingviews columnists discuss the impact on giants (https://www.breakingviews.com/considered-view/copycat-drugmakers-will-be-low-key-obesity-winners/)  like Novo Nordisk and how other countries might react.

items.title: LIVE: Protesters gather in Seoul to demand resignation of South Korean President Yoon Suk Yeol
items.author: Reuters
items.content:

items.author: Reuters
items.content:
